name: Self-Frosting Date Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir dates and baking soda into boiling water; set aside, and let cool.
2. Cream shortening. Gradually add 1 cup sugar, beating well at medium speed on a mixer.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt.
5. Add the date mixture alternately with the flour mixture, beginning and ending with the flour mixture. Mix after each addition.
6. Pour batter into a greased and floured 13x9x2 inch baking pan.
7. Combine brown sugar, pecans, and chocolate morsels; sprinkle over top of batter.
8. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Let cool in the pan on a wire rack.
15 servings.
